research_interests: Acceleration design for AI and machine learning applications
Low-power embedded memory design (Latch, SRAM, Register-File, FIFO, CAM/TCAM)
Memory sub-system for heterogeneous multi-core SoC/SiP

Compression techniques of memory accesses for mmWave wireless communications and Radar
